Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 8
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL except DWF TRL OGR HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

it also drops off the heretics in stonebrunt, but probably easier to buy one, esp. if you're high enough lvl to be hunting out there.

__DEL__1595780182257
5 posts
u can get a kite shield from the guy near the Halas combat pit. it cost me 5pp
from Garrbut
leader of Northern Windwalkers
Karana

▲ Page top
wrong AC
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2001 at 10:54 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593966087211
View User Forum
18 posts
I just made one of those for my new Vah Shir and the AC is 9 not 8.
▲ Page top
RE: wrong AC
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2002 at 3:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Actually, it depends... although both versions of "kite shield" have exactly the same name, they don't have the same ac. Storebought (out of a merchant's permanent inventory) or mob dropped kite shields have 8 ac, but player-smithed kite shields have 9 ac. I believe this is the case with most, if not all, of the shields you smith that have an identically named version sold in merchants' permanent inventories; player-smithed ones have an extra ac over the storebought version (I know this is at least true for the kite shield and round shield.)

Edited, Wed Nov 20 03:04:38 2002
▲ Page top
